rationale: Both correctly diagnose the base-tokenizer/extended-ratio-token crash and the config mismatch (moe.yaml=Instruct two-stage vs dit.yaml=base single-stage), matching the thread's resolution and FayeSpica's confirmed workaround. Y is more complete, explicitly mirroring the thread's two-part ask (docs fix + fail-fast guard) plus a concrete tolerant-fix patch and correct closing disposition tied to Gaohan123's follow-up-issue request; X's config table adds an unverified third yaml (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) not evidenced anywhere in the thread. Y's specific line numbers and claim about both yaml headers saying 'Instruct' are unverifiable and slightly self-contradictory, so grounding is only modestly ahead of X's vaguer but safer citations; neither mentions the PR #2713/modes-filtering regression detail from the thread.
